author: vvo
subject: v1.4.0
body: # [1.4.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.3.3...v1.4.0) (2016-03-16) ### Bug Fixes * **url:** allow hierarchical facets in trackedParameters ([36b4011](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/36b4011)) ### Features * **url-sync:** use the new mapping option ([f869885](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f869885)), closes [#838](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/838)
